story.iWant: download the entire deck as a PDF
story.soThat: I can share a complete document version

task.name: Inline jsPDF library
task.subtask: Add to script section before application code

task.name: Implement downloadDeckPDF() function
task.subtask: Create jsPDF instance with landscape orientation and custom page size
For each slide: load in iframe, capture as PNG, convert to base64, add to PDF
Add new page for each slide (except first)

task.name: Optimize PDF generation
task.subtask: Handle large decks without memory issues

task.name: Wire up menu item
task.subtask: Replace placeholder downloadDeckPDF() with full implementation
Menu item already wired at line 598

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given I am viewing slides in presentation mode, when I click "Download as PDF" from the download menu, then a progress modal appears
The progress bar updates as each slide is processed
When complete, a PDF file downloads automatically
The PDF contains all slides as separate pages in landscape orientation
Each page is 1920x1080 pixels (matching slide dimensions)
The PDF file size is reasonable (less than 50MB for a 14-slide deck)

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Use jsPDF to create a multi-page PDF document with each slide rendered as a full-page image. PDF uses custom page size [1920, 1080] in landscape orientation with hotfixes: ['px_scaling'].

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Create jsPDF instance with orientation: 'landscape', unit: 'px', format: [1920, 1080], hotfixes: ['px_scaling']. Use pdf.addImage() for each slide PNG.

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.snippet: PDF file: {deckName}.pdf. Use sanitizeFilename() function already available in viewer-template.html.

doc.title: Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Progress modal shows during generation, PDF pages are landscape 1920x1080, file size is reasonable, works with file:// protocol.

doc.title: Previous Story - Batch PNG Export
doc.snippet: Progress modal infrastructure (showProgressModal, updateProgress, hideProgressModal) already implemented. captureSlideForExport() function available for capturing any slide by index.

file.reason: Placeholder function to be replaced with full PDF export implementation
Existing function to capture any slide as PNG blob - reuse for PDF generation
Progress modal display function - reuse for PDF generation progress
Progress bar update function - reuse for PDF generation progress
Progress modal hide function - call after PDF generation completes
Filename sanitization utility - use for PDF filename generation
Reference implementation for batch slide processing with progress modal - follow similar pattern for PDF
Menu item already wired to downloadDeckPDF() - no changes needed to menu HTML
Use to regenerate viewer after template changes for testing

node.purpose: PDF document generation - must be inlined in viewer template

existing.purpose: Already inlined in viewer-template.html for PNG capture

constraints.constraint: Follow existing downloadAllSlidesPNG() pattern for batch processing
Use captureSlideForExport() for slide PNG capture (returns blob)
Process slides sequentially to manage memory
Must work with file:// protocol (no server required)
Use appropriate image compression for reasonable file sizes

interface.name: jsPDF constructor
interface.signature: new jsPDF({ orientation: 'landscape', unit: 'px', format: [1920, 1080], hotfixes: ['px_scaling'] })

tests.standards: Manual browser testing. No automated test framework. Test with file:// protocol and http:// protocol. Test across Chrome, Safari, Firefox. Verify PDF opens correctly in standard PDF viewers.

ideas.idea: Click Download as PDF menu item, verify progress modal appears with title
Watch progress bar during generation, verify it updates for each slide
Wait for generation to complete, verify PDF download triggers automatically
Open PDF, verify all slides present as separate pages in landscape
Check PDF page dimensions are 1920x1080 (view page properties)
Check PDF file size is reasonable (less than 50MB for 14-slide deck)
Test with file:// protocol (open index.html directly without server)
Verify slide content renders correctly (text, SVGs, backgrounds)
Test with large deck to ensure no memory issues

completionNotes.note: Implemented batch PNG export with ZIP bundling using JSZip v3.10.1
Added progress modal (CSS + HTML) with animated progress bar
Created captureSlideForExport() function that works with any slide index
Full downloadAllSlidesPNG() implementation processes slides sequentially to manage memory
Works with both file:// and http:// protocols using srcdoc fallback
ZIP uses DEFLATE compression level 6 for good balance of size/speed

service.name: captureSlideForExport
service.purpose: Capture any slide as PNG blob by index - REUSE for PDF generation

service.name: showProgressModal
service.purpose: Show progress modal with title - REUSE for PDF progress

service.name: updateProgress
service.purpose: Update progress bar and text - REUSE for PDF progress

service.name: hideProgressModal
service.purpose: Hide progress modal - REUSE after PDF complete

patternsEstablished.pattern: Sequential slide processing to manage memory
Small delay (10ms) between slides to prevent UI freezing
srcdoc fallback for file:// protocol compatibility

filesModified.file: .slide-builder/templates/viewer-template.html - Added JSZip library, progress modal CSS/HTML, and batch export functions
